recent_excerpts: Florida law enforcement is investigating how a student used ChatGPT to craft a threat of a campus shooting, part of a broader pattern where AI chatbots fail to block dangerous content.
The Los Angeles Police Department reports a breach of 7.7 terabytes and 337,000 files from a city attorney's digital storage system, exposing sensitive law enforcement data.
